params.name: Ode to Joy
params.description:
On Jan 7, 1823 AD, Beethoven finished his most famous musical piece Ode to Joy.
Ode to Joy is the finale of Beethoven's Ninth Symphony. Beethoven almost spent half of his life on the planning of the piece. He didn't finish it until after years of devotion to musical creation. But the rehearsal had many problems. The first rehearsal was bad, some even suggested that Beethoven change some of the parts to lower the difficulty. But Beethoven was a perfectionist, and he didn't change a note. The r …
